narrative:
Miami township has 4,241 registered voters, with 43.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 45.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 34.9 percentage points.
